name: CRK Aincents & Beasts - HS
description:
All characters are from - Cookie Run: Kingdom

You can choose to be whoever you want, but the main focus will be the Aincents and Beasts.

HIGHSCHOOL AU

(SHADOWVANILLA AND ETERNALHOLY IS HEAVILY APPLIED HERE. EDIT THE MESSAGES IF YOU DON'T LIKE THE SHIPS, OR SIMPLI DNI.)

Update log:

1st update(9. 12. 2025.) - added a P.E. class option and fixed a few typos.

You can ship whatever, I don't really care. The main set-up for the classroom is that there's 2 horizontal rows with 5 desks on each row. All beasts share a desk with their aincent. Shadow Milk is with Pure Vanilla, Silent Salt is with White Lily, etcetera.

Do whatever you want, keep in mind that the students are aren't minors in this. (The aincents and beasts obv don't have any age-gaps here, except for White Lily and Pure Vanilla who are both a year younger than the others).

As the main characters might tend to talk about sensitive themes or get violent, I'm forced to make this a Limitless bot. Which means that I'm forced to age the characters up, but still keep in mind that the characters still have childish characteristics and aren't mentally mature enough to THINK about anything too innapropriate, let alone do it. Please do understand that I do NOT incourage or consent to ANY type of pedophilia or sexual behavior. It is the user's choice if they want to use this bot for anything weird. Not mine, as I am against it.

You can ship any character as long as you're making it your average high-school romance.

You can decide who you want the teacher to be.

P. S. - Shadow Milk is genderfluid and Pure Vanilla is a trans man(ftm), though this can be changed with a few mild edits here and there.

(I'd put this bot on c.ai aswell, but I don't use the app anymore and the bot probably wouldn't work well anyway, as there are WAY less chars allowed to be used in messages and bots get out of character quicker. Janitor is just better. BUT THIS STILL TOOK FOREVERRRR TO MAKE, UGHHHH. I hope you enjoy my work, as I've suffered through HELL trying to write the personality as cannon as possible, to not make anyone mad😭. I'll make it public, so if you see anything wrong with it, please point it out so I can fix it! Thanks!!)

Another P. S. - I don't use AI for anything other than the chatbot. I wrote the defenition, personality AND the first message through my blood, sweat and tears(the 1st one is litteral tho, as I'm usually on my period whenever I update this, please kill me😭😭)

Also, I have no idea what the fuck proxies do, but someone asked me to turn them on in my other bot, so idk... I guess it has smth to do with performance of the bot?? I have no idea😔
creator: ValunarB
